[{"action": "createPart", "name": "ClickArea", "parent": "Workspace", "properties": {"Size": [5, 0.5, 5], "Position": [0, 0.25, 0], "Anchored": true, "Color": [1, 0, 0]}}, {"action": "createScript", "name": "ClickScript", "parent": "ClickArea", "scriptContent": "--// Services
local Players = game:GetService("Players")

--// Variables
local clickArea = script.Parent
local clicks = 0
local clickAmount = 1

--// Functions
local function onMouseClicked(player)
	clicks = clicks + clickAmount
	player.PlayerGui.MainGui.ClickLabel.Text = "Clicks: " .. clicks
end

--// Connections
clickArea.ClickDetector.MouseClick:Connect(onMouseClicked)"}, {"action": "insertObject", "name": "ClickDetector", "parent": "ClickArea", "className": "ClickDetector"}, {"action": "createFolder", "name": "PlayerGuis", "parent": "StarterGui"}, {"action": "createScreenGui", "name": "MainGui", "parent": "PlayerGuis"}, {"action": "createFrame", "name": "ClickFrame", "parent": "MainGui", "properties": {"Size": [0.3, 0.1], "Position": [0.35, 0.85], "BackgroundColor3": [0, 0, 0], "BorderSizePixel": 0}}, {"action": "createTextLabel", "name": "ClickLabel", "parent": "ClickFrame", "properties": {"Size": [1, 1], "Position": [0, 0], "BackgroundColor3": [1, 1, 1], "BackgroundTransparency": 1, "Text": "Clicks: 0", "TextColor3": [1, 1, 1], "TextScaled": true, "TextXAlignment": "Center", "TextYAlignment": "Center"}}]
